board.name: Emma & James — September Wedding
board.description: Outdoor garden wedding at Riverside Estate. Guest count: 120. Budget target: $35,000. Must finalize vendor contracts by end of April.

tasks.name: Sign Riverside Estate contract
tasks.description: Deposit of $3,000 due on signing. Rain plan: indoor pavilion included. Ceremony at 4 PM, reception at 6 PM.

tasks.name: Confirm wedding date with church
tasks.description: Need to coordinate ceremony time with the priest. Block 2 PM to 3:30 PM slot.

tasks.name: Book hotel room block
tasks.description: Negotiate 15-room block at The Grand. Rate locked at $189/night. Must release unsold rooms 30 days prior.

tasks.name: Finalize menu tasting
tasks.description: Tasting session scheduled for March 10. Choose between plated dinner vs buffet. Must accommodate 3 vegan and 2 gluten-free guests.

tasks.name: Order wedding cake
tasks.description: Three-tier vanilla buttercream with fresh flowers. Baker needs final guest count 2 weeks before.

tasks.name: Arrange bar service
tasks.description: Open bar for first 2 hours, then cash bar. Signature cocktail: lavender gin fizz. Estimate total bar cost: $2,400.

tasks.name: Order late-night snack station
tasks.description: Mini sliders and poutine at 10 PM. Guest favorite at every wedding we have been to.

tasks.name: Arrange cake cutting set
tasks.description: Order a nice cake cutting set with server and knife. Can also use as a keepsake.

tasks.name: Send save-the-date cards
tasks.description: Ordered from Minted. Mailing out this week. Include wedding website QR code.

tasks.name: Create seating chart template
tasks.description: Round tables of 10. Head table for bridal party (8 people). Assign dietary restriction notes to each place.

tasks.name: Track RSVPs online
tasks.description: Set up Google Sheets tracker with columns for meal choice, plus-one, and song requests.

tasks.name: Book photographer
tasks.description: Contract signed with Sarah Chen Photography. 8 hours coverage plus second shooter. Engagement shoot included.

tasks.name: Hire DJ or band
tasks.description: Getting quotes from 3 DJs. Must have MC experience for announcements. Need uplighting package.

tasks.name: Order floral arrangements
tasks.description: Bridal bouquet in white roses and eucalyptus. Centerpieces: low arrangements in gold vases. Confirm flower availability for September.

tasks.name: Book shuttle for guests
tasks.description: Charter bus from hotel to venue and back. Capacity: 40 passengers. Two trips if needed.

tasks.name: Create vendor arrival schedule
tasks.description: Florist at 10 AM, caterer at 12 PM, DJ at 2 PM, photographer at 3 PM.

tasks.name: Assign point people
tasks.description: Maid of honor handles bride's phone. Best man handles groom's family. Coordinator handles all vendors.

tasks.name: Book honeymoon flights
tasks.description: Round trip to Santorini booked. Departure: day after wedding at 2 PM. Return: 10 days later.

tasks.name: Order wedding invitations
tasks.description: 50 invitations with RSVP cards ordered. Addressing envelopes with calligraphy style.

tasks.name: Book engagement shoot with photographer
tasks.description: Scheduled for April 5 at the botanical gardens. Included in the photography package.
